operations.description: Retrieve the TOC tree for a BWB document version. Flat list of articles parsed from the toestand XML at indexer time. Each entry carries id, nr, title, startPage and startSourceFile.

WettenOverheidNlBwbTocResponse.description: Table of contents for a BWB document. Flat list of articles parsed from the toestand XML at indexer time. Each entry carries id, nr, title, startPage and startSourceFile.

toc.description: Flat list of articles parsed from the toestand XML at indexer time. Each entry carries id, nr, title, startPage and startSourceFile.

JsonNode.description: Article entry parsed from the toestand XML at indexer time, carrying id, nr, title, startPage and startSourceFile.
